basic_details.job_title: Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Bharathidasan University has released the official Guest Lecturer Recruitment Notification 2026 for 1 vacancy. Candidates possessing qualifications as per UGC norms with JRF, NET, SET, or Ph.D. are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 22 July 2026. Candidates should refer to the official notification for age limit and other eligibility details. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: As per UGC Norms with JRF/NET/SET/Ph.D.
qualification.details: Guest Lecturer: As per UGC Norms with JRF/NET/SET/Ph.D.

content_sections.heading: Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Bharathidasan University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Job 2026 Notification PDF

Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Guest Lecturer: As per UGC Norms with JRF/NET/SET/Ph.D.

content_sections.heading: Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Bharathidasan University recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Bharathidasan University recruitment is Guest Lecturer. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Lecturer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Guest Lecturer post in Bharathidasan University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date for the Guest Lecturer position?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Guest Lecturer position is scheduled for 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest Lecturer post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required is as per UGC Norms with JRF/NET/SET/Ph.D.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Guest Lecturer role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Bharathidasan University office in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original documents and self-attested copies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job for the Guest Lecturer position at Bharathidasan University.
